text:
Great question! The schema injection script adds JSON-LD data that AI agents can read when they visit your site.

On your **Setup tab**, you're looking at the generated code for your Wix site. Here's what you're working with:

**The schema injection script** looks like this [3]:
```html
<script src="https://geo.flowblinq.com/api/t/{your-slug}" async></script>
```

This goes in your page's `<head>` section. When AI bots (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini) crawl your site, this script automatically injects structured data about your business.

**For Wix specifically**, the Setup tab generates Wix-compatible code and instructions. Since Wix has a specific interface for custom code (typically in Settings), the Setup tab should show you exactly where and how to add it for your platform.

**If the Setup tab instructions aren't clear**, or if you need hands-on help implementing it on Wix, email **hello@flowblinq.ai** — they can walk you through the Wix-specific steps.

Is the Setup tab showing you the Wix integration code? Or would you like help with something else from your audit results?
